title: Play Creative Music in Survival
description: Play Creative Mode's music in survival, made by MJ
body:
O) Now you can play creative mode only music like Aria Math by c418 and others in Survival mode too.



Updated to 1.21



NOTE :
1. This is a resource pack, just add and enable in game.
2. While using Universal version ignore the warning "its made for older version" !



my Discord For Contact : mj_83_
